title: Anchor the Real
description: Reality anchors in the Shattered Expanse are failing. They must be repaired before the islands drift into the Abyss.

stages.text: Engineer Pell waves you over urgently. 'Three reality anchors have gone offline. Without them, the floating islands — including the one we're standing on — will drift into the Abyss. I need someone who can survive the Expanse to reach the anchors and restart them.'

choices.label: Get technical specs for the anchors

stages.text: The first anchor is guarded by void stalkers feeding on its energy. The second is encased in a reality fracture. The third... the third is inside a thought eater colony.

choices.label: Bypass the fracture with dimensional phasing

stages.text: All three anchors hum back to life. The islands stabilize. Pell's relief is audible even over the comms. 'You just saved every soul on these islands. I owe you a drink and more.'
